title: Reports to law enforcement agencies
doc_html:
§1112.  Reports to law enforcement agencies

Probation and parole officers shall notify every law enforcement agency of any prisoner or parolees assigned to or presently working within the agency's jurisdiction under a work release program.  

Added by Acts 1974, No. 509, §1.
